action.reasoning: Observation: ConvNeXt-Tiny at 224px with mixup+label smoothing for 6 epochs got val_acc 0.5946 (steadily improving). Training is stable. Analysis: Val capped ~0.60 due to noise. Need to submit eval to compare to baseline 0.7743. Each epoch ~35s, so 6 epochs ~3.5min. Decision: Submit eval first to see test accuracy.
